title: Bright Riverside Holiday Park
description: Cosy 2-bedroom units, cabins and villas, offering kitchens, patios and a BBQ area.
address: Unit 4/10 Toorak Rd, Bright VIC 3741, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set in the Alpine Valleys wine region, these rural holiday cottages overlook the Ovens River and are 1.5 km from the Bright Art Gallery.
 The cosy, 2-bedroom units feature wood panelling and include kitchens, dining tables and flat-screens, as well as DVD players and ceiling fans (no air-conditioning). They also have shared bathrooms, and patios with outdoor furniture. Cabins and charming villas add air-conditioning and en suite bathrooms.
 Amenities include free parking, in addition to BBQs and laundry facilities.

title: Howitt Park
description: Compact park in a scenic riverside setting featuring a large wooden children's play structure.

updatesFromCustomers.text: I love coming to this dog park. There are two parks here, one for small dogs and another for large dogs.  Always a clean area and well kept, friendly people and rarely is the park super busy in the mornings. Lots of shade, dog bathing, water bowls, and lots of space to run and play.
